title: knautia rigidiuscula
intro: Knautia rigidiuscula, also known as the stiff knautia, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Valerianaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects, which can aid in relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Knautia rigidiuscula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Knautia rigidiuscula typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the leaves and flowers of the plant, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
